projects.name: Solar + Energy Storage on Garage
projects.description: Install 5-7 solar panels on south-facing garage roof face (20x12 ft, ~2-2.8 kW) plus battery storage. Solar = standalone ROI investment (~5yr payback at $0.42/kWh). Battery = generator alternative (no lot space for generator). 30% federal ITC applies to both when paired.
projects.notes: DESIGN: South garage face only. 5 portrait panels = 2.0 kW; 7 mixed = 2.8 kW. ~3,200-4,500 kWh/yr production (20-26% offset). All-in after ITC: solar ~$9-10k, battery ~$9-10k. VENDORS: Sunergy (sunergy.com) — EnergySage 2026 CA Installer of Year, Enphase Platinum, no door-to-door. NRG Clean Power (nrgcleanpower.com) — Diamond Certified, 35yr, San Mateo County, 40yr warranty. Tesla Energy (tesla.com/energy) — online only. AVOID: Sunrun.

tasks.title: Analyze energy usage and size system
tasks.notes: 17,178 kWh/yr at $0.42/kWh avg. Target: 5-7 panels south garage face (20x12 ft) = 2-2.8 kW. ~5yr payback after ITC.

tasks.title: Research and shortlist solar installers
tasks.notes: Shortlist: Sunergy (sunergy.com, Enphase Platinum, no door-to-door), NRG Clean Power (nrgcleanpower.com, Diamond Certified, San Mateo County), Tesla Energy (tesla.com/energy, online only). Avoid Sunrun.

tasks.title: Contact installers for quotes
tasks.notes: Spec: south garage face (20x12 ft, 5-7 panels, ~2-2.8 kW), paired battery (Enphase IQ or Powerwall 3), detached garage sub-panel interconnect. Ask each for: $/W, panel brand, inverter type, battery spec, warranty, timeline, ITC total. Request free shade/LIDAR analysis.

tasks.title: Compare quotes and select installer
tasks.notes: Prefer Enphase microinverters over string inverter. Compare $/W, battery spec, warranty, timeline. 30% ITC on full system incl. battery.

tasks.title: Confirm ITC timing — credit files in year PTO is granted
tasks.notes: 30% federal ITC on Form 5695. Claimed in tax year Permission to Operate granted by PG&E. Battery qualifies only when solar-paired. Plan install timing accordingly.

maintenance.notes: Thermador dishwasher. New 2025. Clean filter every 6 months. Warranty: typically 2yr.

insights.summary: [living_room] The indoor scene shows no signs of distress following the recent scream alert from the dog run.
[living_room] An alarming sound of someone screaming in pain or fear was detected from the dog run area 76 seconds ago.
[living_room] Audio of someone screaming in pain or fear at the dog run is a high-priority concern.

The convergence of 15 active mobile devices, a recent child distress audio spike, and subsequent multi-zone unclassified audio indicates the family is likely gathered indoors in camera-blind areas, possibly addressing the earlier incident; verifying the unknown driveway vehicle and unblocked gate is recommended to rule out a lingering visitor and ensure perimeter security.
Unusually high activity at front_yard this hour: 5 observations vs typical 1 for weekday 13:00
[living_room] A child is crying or yelling in distress at the entryway

The simultaneous failure of multiple camera feeds, combined with sudden multi-zone audio spikes and dog barking, strongly indicates a network or streaming infrastructure issue causing false triggers rather than an external event. Additionally, the detached backyard gate panel poses a physical security risk that now requires manual inspection due to the loss of reliable visual monitoring.

The presence of 12 mobile devices confirms the household is home, yet all cameras consistently report empty feeds alongside multiple stream errors. This creates a critical blind spot that could be masking an ongoing emergency or unauthorized activity.

The convergence of a white van and unknown person in the driveway at 10:28, urgent dog barking, and multiple simultaneous camera feed failures indicates an unverified visitor or delivery occurring while the system's visual monitoring is compromised. Steve should manually verify the front door and driveway, as the automated alerts are likely missing real activity due to the streaming errors.
[front_yard] The camera feed has been intermittently failing to receive frames, showing an error message.
